text: Update bin/apiease-cli.js to wire create, read, update, and delete as explicit public CLI commands.
goal: Implement apiease read, apiease update, and apiease delete as public CLI commands.
context: The current entrypoint only resolves init and upgrade explicitly and otherwise falls through to create.
The new public command surface needs explicit dispatch for create, read, update, delete, init, and upgrade while keeping the bin entrypoint thin.
steps: Instantiate the new read, update, and delete command classes with the required clients and shared collaborators.
Replace create-by-default dispatch with explicit command resolution for the full public command set.
Add top-level usage and unexpected-error handling that works for all commands without create-specific wording.
constraints: Keep business logic in src/cli and src/client rather than moving it into bin/apiease-cli.js.
Preserve existing init, upgrade, create, JSON failure output, and exit-code behavior unless the new explicit command model requires a top-level usage failure for unknown commands.
acceptanceCriteria: runCli delegates create, read, update, delete, init, and upgrade to the correct command objects based on the first argument.
Unknown or missing commands fail with non-zero top-level usage output instead of silently routing to create.
Unexpected runtime failures still emit structured JSON when --json is present and no longer hardcode create-only human-readable error text for read, update, or delete.
